name: Archaeologist
description: Reads ruins, relics, and the people reckless enough to disturb them.

name: Brawler
description: Breaks obstacles, monsters, and bad plans with brute force.

name: Mystic
description: Senses the uncanny and bargains with truths others would rather avoid.

name: Scout
description: Moves first, sees trouble early, and survives by staying hard to pin down.

name: Scholar
description: Wins through knowledge, memory, and dangerous curiosity.

name: Thief
description: Bypasses locks, traps, and social boundaries with practiced nerve.
